{{Infobox character
| name = Kiuran
| aliases = Kiuran the Hound, Kiuran of the Hounds
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Hound]], heavenly messenger, [[Kiuran|Kiuran the Hound]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, one-star Titan}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Hounds]], [[Abidan]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|heavenly messenger}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

''See also: [[Kiuran Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Kiuran, also known as Kiuran the [[Hound]] or Kiuran of the [[Hounds]], is a white-armored messenger and a one-star [[Titan]]. He possesses rat-like facial features, dark eyes, and a thin beard. As a member of an order called the [[Hounds]], he identifies individuals as [[Waybound]] if they demonstrate exceptional [[Abidan]] potential and are destined to connect with the [[Way Between Worlds]]. In his capacity as a messenger, he oversees tournament proceedings, manages schedules to prevent interruptions from [[Dreadgods]], and enforces instructions regarding non-interference. While he often displays an arrogant or smug demeanor toward [[Monarchs]], he has demonstrated the ability to use magic to silence others. He maintains a level of protection over certain individuals, though his authority is subject to higher powers within the cosmic hierarchy.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Kiuran the [[Hound]] is a rat-like man characterized by dark, beady eyes and a thin beard. Serving as a heavenly messenger, he wears smooth eggshell armor belonging to the [[Abidan]] and claims the ability to perceive future outcomes long before they occur. During his time as a [[Hound]], he was eventually contained within a blue bubble of the [[Way]]. While in this state, he engaged in conversation with [[Yerin]] regarding the burial of a [[dragon]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Kiuran]] is a [[Hound]] and a rat-like man with a thin beard and dark, beady eyes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Kiuran]] wears smooth eggshell armor of the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Kiuran]] is a heavenly messenger.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Kiuran]] claims to see the future/outcomes long ago.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Kiuran]] is of the [[Hounds]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Kiuran]] the [[Hound]] is contained within a blue bubble of the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Kiuran]] is known as [[Kiuran]] the [[Hound]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] spoke to [[Kiuran]] about burying a [[dragon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kiuran]] is a one-star [[Titan]] and a member of the [[Hounds]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“You’re not aiming to keep civilians out of it?” Yerin asked her companion. Kiuran the Hound chuckled, looking over the world beneath him like a rat-faced king.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Yerin turned to Kiuran. "I’m burying that dragon," she said.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Hounds]]
[[Category:Abidan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
